title: AI Toolbox Plugin Manifest
description: Schema for .agent/plugins/<name>/manifest.json. Plugins are file-based extensions that contribute rules and context hints to the toolbox without runtime code.

name.description: Plugin identifier. Lowercase, hyphen-separated. Must match the directory name under .agent/plugins/.

version.description: Plugin version. Recorded in .ai-toolbox/lock.json for reproducibility.

description.description: One-line summary of what the plugin contributes.

rules.description: Markdown files (relative to plugin directory) that should be referenced from AGENT.md when the plugin is active.

context_hints.description: Glob patterns marking files that the context-build heuristic should weight up when this plugin is active.

priority.description: Used to order plugin rule references in AGENT.md and to break ties during conflict resolution. Higher = applied later (overrides earlier).

conflict_resolution.description: How this plugin behaves if another plugin contributes overlapping rules. override = this plugin wins; merge = both rule files are referenced; fail = bootstrap aborts with PLUGIN_ERROR.

requires_toolbox_version.description: Minimum AI Toolbox version required. Bootstrap refuses to install if local toolbox is older.
